title: Fix parameterized class typedef as interface type parameter (#6983)
body:
Fixes #6983.

PR #6834 fixed using parameterized class typedefs as module type parameters. This extends the fix to work with interface type parameters.

## Problem

When an interface is instantiated with a type parameter like:
```systemverilog
A_if #(B#(64)::pld_t) w_A_Bpld ();
```

The parameterized class `flux_st` needs to be specialized before its typedef `pld_t` can be resolved. The existing `resolveDotToTypedef()` function didn't trigger class specialization when the `ClassOrPackageRef` had parameters.

## Solution

Modified `resolveDotToTypedef()` in `V3Param.cpp` to call `classRefDeparam()` when the class reference has parameters but hasn't been specialized yet.

## Test

Added `t_iface_param_class_typedef` test case that verifies parameterized class typedefs work correctly as interface type parameters.
